raw:
## Completed
Implemented the Foreman Gate 1 planner understanding layer: optional normalized plan fields, founder-facing rendering sections, planner prompt contract updates, and expanded headless tests.

## Files Changed
- `extensions/foreman/planner.ts` - added optional understanding-layer types/normalizers/render sections.
- `extensions/foreman/crew/planner.md` - updated planner instructions and PLAN-JSON contract.
- `extensions/foreman/test/planner_test.sh` - added validation/render/back-compat tests while preserving extractJsonBlock regression.

## How To Verify
`grep -q "claude-opus-4-8:xhigh" extensions/foreman/crew/planner.md && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_timeout_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/gates_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/reviewer_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/guard_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/fallback_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/ledger_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/dashboard/test/reader_test.sh`

## Notes
Verification passed. Existing unrelated dirty/untracked files were present; scoped changes are only the three requested files.
